form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 11 at Randwick Bm88 December 27 over 2000m, 6 len behind Unlimited with 56.5kg at $2.15. Previously first up; fourth of 11 at Warwick Farm Bm72 October 15 over 1400m, 0.7 len behind Little Beginnings carrying 59.5kg at $3.90. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up ran last of 9 at Rosehill 3&4yo Bm78 on February 21 over 1100m, 6 len behind Signor Tortoni with 59kg at $10. form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Warwick Farm Bm78 on April 1 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Formal Display carrying 57.5kg at $9.50. Before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a head at Kembla Grange Cond Bm68 February 24 over 1300m defeating Duke Of Camden carrying 60.5kg at $3.50. Sure to be tough to beat from an inside barrier.

Expect a bold showing.
